text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, January 04. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Sarah found a new recipe to try. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is practicing Moonlight Sonata for the upcoming piano recital. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Hosted a game night at our place. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Sure thing! Meal planning saves so much time. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Automations are great when they work. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
